    • NO_ELEMENTS

  • Constructor Details

    • EventBUtils

      public EventBUtils()

  • Method Details

    • getAbstractMachine

      public static IMachineRoot getAbstractMachine(IMachineRoot concrete) throws RodinDBException
      Gets the abstract machine of an event-B machine. This is done by checking the lists of refines machine clause of the input file. The input is assumed to be not null.
      Parameters:
      concrete - a Rodin File
      Returns:
      the abstract file corresponding to the input file. If there are no refines machine or there are more than 1 refine machines then null is returned. Otherwise, the handle to the file corresponding the refine machine will be returned.
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if there are some problems in reading the refines machine clause or in getting the abstract machine.

    • getAbstractContexts

      public static IContextRoot[] getAbstractContexts(IContextRoot concrete) throws RodinDBException
      Returns the contexts which are extended by a given context. This is done by checking the lists of extends context clause of the context root element.
      Parameters:
      concrete - a context root element
      Returns:
      the root elements of the contexts that are extended
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if there is any problem in reading the extends context clause or in getting the abstract context.

    • getFirstChildOfTypeWithLabel

      private static <T extends ILabeledElement> T getFirstChildOfTypeWithLabel(IInternalElement parent, IInternalElementType<T> type, String label) throws RodinDBException
      Get the first child of an input parent having the specified type and label.
      Type Parameters:
      T - an internal element class (i.e. extends IInternalElement.
      Parameters:
      parent - the internal parent (IInternalElement).
      type - the type of the child (IInternalElementType).
      label - the label of the child that we are looking for.
      Returns:
      the child of the input parent with the input type and having the label as the input label.
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if some problems occur in getting the list of child elements or the label attributes of child elements.

    • getAbstractEvent

      public static IEvent getAbstractEvent(IEvent event) throws RodinDBException
      Gets the abstract event of an event. This is done by getting the abstract component and reading the refines event clause.
      Parameters:
      event - an input event
      Returns:
      the abstract event corresponding to the input event or null. Returns null in the following cases:
      • If the abstract machine does not exist.
      • If there is no abstract machine corresponding to the file contains the machine containing the input event.
      • If there is no refines event child (except for INITIALISATION).
      • If there are more than one refines event child.
      • if there is no abstract event corresponding to the refines event clause.
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if some problems occur in getting the abstract file or reading the refines event child.
      See Also:
      • getAbstractMachine(IMachineRoot)

    • getAbstractEventLabel

      private static String getAbstractEventLabel(IEvent event) throws RodinDBException
      Throws:
      RodinDBException

    • getImplicitChildren

      public static IInternalElement[] getImplicitChildren(IEvent event) throws RodinDBException
      Returns the children of the abstractions of the given event that are implicitly inherited through extension.

      The children returned are sorted with the children of the most abstract event first. The order of children in each event is preserved.

      Parameters:
      event - an event
      Returns:
      an array of all children that are implicitly inherited by the given event through extension
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if some problems occurs

    • prependInheritedChildren

      private static void prependInheritedChildren(List<IRodinElement> result, IEvent event) throws RodinDBException
      Throws:
      RodinDBException

    • isInherited

      private static boolean isInherited(IRodinElement child)

    • getFreeChildName

      public static <T extends IInternalElement> String getFreeChildName(IInternalElement parent, IInternalElementType<T> type, String prefix) throws RodinDBException
      Get a free child name (internal name) for a new child element, given the parent element, the type of the child element and a proposed prefix for the name. A new unique name will be the prefix with a index appended to the end.
      Type Parameters:
      T - an internal element class (i.e. extends IInternalElement.
      Parameters:
      parent - the internal parent (IInternalElement).
      type - the type of the child (IInternalElementType).
      prefix - the proposed prefix for the child internal name.
      Returns:
      the new unique name for the child of the input parent which has the input type.
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if some problems occur.

    • getFreeChildNameIndex

      public static <T extends IInternalElement> String getFreeChildNameIndex(IInternalElement parent, IInternalElementType<T> type, String prefix) throws RodinDBException
      Get a free index for a new child element, given the parent element, the type of the child element and a proposed prefix for the name. A new free index will be the index appended to so that the name by appending the index to the input prefix is also new. The index will be the smallest available index starting from the input beginIndex.
      Type Parameters:
      T - an internal element class (i.e. extends IInternalElement.
      Parameters:
      parent - the internal parent (IInternalElement).
      type - the type of the child (IInternalElementType).
      prefix - the proposed prefix for the child internal name.
      Returns:
      the new free index for the child of the input parent which has the input type.
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if some problems occur.

    • isReadOnly

      public static boolean isReadOnly(IInternalElement element)
      Returns whether the given element is read only.

      An element is read only iff its root is a generated element.

      Parameters:
      element - an internal element to check
      Returns:
      true iff the given element is read only

    • isGenerated

      private static boolean isGenerated(IInternalElement element) throws RodinDBException
      Throws:
      RodinDBException

    • setHyperlinkImage

      public static void setHyperlinkImage(org.eclipse.ui.forms.widgets.ImageHyperlink hyperlink, org.eclipse.swt.graphics.Image image)
      Use this method to avoid a bug on Mac Platform, instead of hyperlink.setImage(image);
      Parameters:
      hyperlink - an hyperlink
      image - an image

    • getFormulaFactoryOrDefault

      public static FormulaFactory getFormulaFactoryOrDefault(IInternalElement element)
      Returns the formula factory used by the root element of the element given as parameter. If the formula factory used by the root element can't be obtained (typically because an extension provider failed), then a default is returned instead.
      Parameters:
      element - the element considered
      Returns:
      the factory associated to the EventBRoot owning the given element or a default factory
